title: 现代汽车将收购软银波士顿动力公司机器人推送股份
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. and its affiliates are moving to acquire SoftBank Group Corp.’s remaining stake in the automaker’s Boston Dynamics unit, securing full ownership of the robotics pioneer at a steep discount as it prepares to deploy its Atlas humanoid robot on factory floors.（原题：Hyundai to Buy SoftBank Boston Dynamics Stake in Robot Push）

title: 日本机器人领导者与 Nvidia 联手挑战中国
summary: Fujitsu Ltd., Fanuc Corp. and two of Japan’s biggest robotics companies will work together in robot development, a move aimed at staying ahead of surging competition from China.（原题：Japan’s Robotics Leaders Unite With Nvidia to Take On China）

title: 日本将购买 Nvidia Rubin 芯片为机器人构建主权人工智能
summary: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.（原题：Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build Sovereign AI for Robots）

title: 半年吸金千亿，具身智能在赌第二个王兴兴

title: 中国派遣机器人到世界各地学习如何做人
summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.（原题：China Sends Robots Out Into the World to Learn How to Be Human）

title: Walden Robotics 推出通用机器人估值 1.1 亿美元
summary: Leading technology companies have invested in Walden Robotics, which emerged from stealth as it develops full-stack physical AI. The post Walden Robotics launches at $1.1B valuation for general-purpose robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Walden Robotics launches at $1.1B valuation for general-purpose robots）

title: Icarus Robotics 使用 KULR 技术为 JOY 自由飞行太空机器人提供动力
summary: Under the agreement, KULR will supply its KULR ONE Space battery systems to power JOY’s onboard systems on the ISS. The post Icarus Robotics uses KULR technology to power JOY free-flying space robot appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Icarus Robotics uses KULR technology to power JOY free-flying space robot）

title: Agility 概述了美国人形机器人政策的六项建议
summary: Peggy Johnson, CEO of Agility, said the U.S. needs a policy framework that can strengthen what's already working for the humanoid industry. The post Agility outlines six recommendations for U.S. humanoid robot policies appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Agility outlines six recommendations for U.S. humanoid robot policies）
